(PE-3516) Remove unnecessary debian templates

Having a postinst with just DEBHELPER in it is accomplished by not having the
file at all. Similarly, the prerm file is functionally the same file that
debhelper will generate once it is installing the init scripts for the debian
package. This commit removes those files.
(PE-37713) Remove useless copy of additional directory to resources dir

(SERVER-1412) Allow build scripts to be included in staging tarball

This commit adds support for creating an  dir
in a project's jar.  If found, ezbake will copy all of the files
found in this directory into the staging directory, so that they
will be included in the tarball that is sent up to the packaging
system.

These files will *not* be included in the final packages, but they
can be referen

(EZ-97) Output fail log message for Debian when start fails

This commit changes the logic for interpreting the result of a start
operation to log an exit code of 1 as a "failure" instead of as a
"success".  Previously, the logic would erroneously log "OK" to output
even though the start command had actually failed.

(EZ-39) Update ezbake to use java 8 when available on debian

Ubuntu's vivid release will include a java 8 package, as will debian's
release after jessie. This commit adds java8-runtime-headless as an
option if java7 is not available.

(EZ-34) Allow ezbake to set apt/yum repo_name for packaging

In order to ship projects such as puppetserver 2.0 to a repo other than
main/products, ezbake needs to be wired up to do so. This commit adds an
ezbake key called repo-target which will set the correct keys in
project_data.yaml to ensure this can happen.
I raised https://github.com/OpenVoxProject/ezbake/pull/103, which makes testing easier
(maint) Remove unneccesary PATH comments from debian/rules

(maint) Use pushd/popd instead of -c for sles init scripts

-c did not behave as expected. Sles used the directory specified as a
chroot and then tried to find the daemon (/opt/puppet/bin/java) within
the directory, where it wouldn't exist. This commit updates the proc
calls to remove the -c, and replaces the one in the start function with
a pushd/popd. The use of pushd means that the shell has to

Does not change PE package builds.

Add a puppet-platform-version argument to EZBake defaulting to 7 (which
maintains the current dependency list) when building for Puppet Platform
8 select newer more appropriate JDK's for each platform. Fails for
unrecognized Platform versions so that we remember to select appropriate
JDKs.

(EZ-100) Terminate java process if start script times out

This commit adds logic to the start script to terminate the Java
background process and purge the associated pidfile if the service
has not been started by the time the start timeout has been reached.

(REPLATS-150) Skip efforts to run as user when already service user

(maint) Remove el5 from build list

EL 5 does not have a sufficient version of java for puppet server or
puppetdb. Because of this, we should not be building or shipping
packages for this platform.

This fixes a regression from b2de7c7a2e7704491a08665a9f53ded8009aa109 where we removed the reload script. Now that we don't fork anymore, we can just rely on , which is a variable provided by systemd.

see https://www.freedesktop.org/software/systemd/man/latest/systemd.service.html#ExecReload=

(EZ-44) Set sudo HOME for foreground

This commit changes executions of commands via sudo from the foreground
subcommand to be done with a -H option.  The -H option causes the HOME
environment variable for the process running in sudo to be set to that
of the default home directory for the target user.  The -H overrides the
default behavior on Ubuntu, which is to preserve the HOME variable value
fo

(EZ-99) Added procps as an explicit package dependency for pgrep

This commit adds procps as an explicit package dependency.  procps
provides pgrep, which is used by a number of the init scripts.

(maint) Update PE packaging to lay out FS correctly

Previously the confdir and datadir would be incorrect in ezbake PE
installations. This commit updates them to use real_name for the confdir
and datadir, so /etc/puppetlabs/pe-classifier becomes
/etc/puppetlabs/classifier and /opt/puppet/share/pe-classifier becomes
/opt/puppet/share/classifier, which is correct for PE.

Merge pull request #403 from aperiodic/maint-nodeploy-env-variable

(EZ-108) Don't deploy if  set

(EZ-97) Add missing check for pid status after kill in aborted start

This commit adds one extra  check to the logic in the
start script which confirms whether an attempt to kill the Java process
for an aborted start was successful.  Without this check, an erroneous
"Java process not killed" trace message might be written even if the
process actually was killed.

(SERVER-344) Choose best method to become puppet

Previously, only the su command was used to switch to the puppet user
and launch Puppet server in the foreground. This does not work on some
systems using SELinux. This commit attempts to use the runuser command
instead if it is installed and the user is running as root, otherwise
sudo or su is used.

(maint) Ensure terminus provides and obsoletes are valid rpm versions

With the introduction of maven timestamps into the version string, the
provides and obsoletes for the termini packages have invalid versions,
which is generating warnings during the build. For example:

This commit addresses that problem but subbing . for - in all of the
terminus versions strings, which will ensure that it is a
(MAINT) Clean up unnecessary action arguments

Fix error capturing return value in debian pe init script

Somehow two lines got joined here. The assignment to RETVAL is supposed to be
on its own line to capture the exit code of start-stop-daemon.

In https://github.com/OpenVoxProject/ezbake/pull/2/commits/6b3ad939736bb8d0f0a22a715f398a49a678a8d3 we introduced a new configuration option for . To get this working, we need to add it to ezbake itself. Otherwise the variable won't exist and we cannot use it in templates:



(see the whitespace after  where the java path should be.

It's not required. But in case my hack here doesn't catch the java bin, or we are on a platform where we don't have an explicit java version, we end up with /usr/bin/java and that works for 80% of the situations.

(EZ-48) Add support for debian systemd

This commit updates both the PE and foss build pipelines to correctly
install systemd scripts for packages built with EZBake. It also cleans
up some of the logic in the {pre,post}{inst,rm} debian scripts.

This only upgrades Ububtu Xenial to systemd, even though it really
should include Debian Jessie. We disable the service in the prerm, which
prevents us fr

(EZ-97) Echo error message when process exits during reload or HUP fails

This commit adds an echo statement if a process exits during a reload
attempt or a HUP signal cannot be sent to the process.  The commit also
replaces 'set -e' with 'set +e' to allow for the exit code for a 'kill
-0 <pid>' to be inspected rather than having the script just exit for a
non-zero value.

(maint) Fix bad version check for sles/systemd

The check for whether or not a sles system was systemd was checking for
os_version <= 12, but sles 12 is systemd. This was resulting in sles 12
packages missing init scripts.

(maint) fix postinst action for RedHat FOSS

This is the companion commit to 570838b, but applied to the foss redhat
spec template.  Matches an unbalanced if.

(CPR-515) Allow separate tasks for install vs upgrade

Currently, the postinstall tasks from the packaged project
are executed unconditionally, both on install as well as
upgrades. This can cause issues, as in the case with puppetserver
potentially overwriting config values if the user has changed them
from the package defaults.

This adds an addtional set of tasks that can be executed in the
pack

(EZ-21) Lay down logrotate for ezbake packages

Ezbake packages can generate a lot of logs, so this commit adds
automatic log rotation for anything in the /var/log/$project directory.
Unfortunately, logrotate scripts are terrible because between certain
versions a line is required in the configuration, without which errors
are generated, but that is not recognized on earlier versions of
logrotate.

(maint) Fix release for final versions

The method to determine the release number was correctly setting the
release for SNAPSHOT builds but was errantly setting it to the version
if this was not a SNAPSHOT build. This fixes that method to return 1 for
non-SNAPSHOT builds, since we don't support custom release numbers.

#### Pull Request (PR) description

The v7 release of  introduced a major change where it will refuse to check out repository state that may be mutated by the pull request. This commit explicitly sets  on the checkout step of the workflow as  has logic for finding the pull request and cherry-picking commits out of it.


#### This Pull Request (PR) fixes the following issues

Eliminate net-tools dependency

ezbake-functions.sh.erb uses the deprecated netstat from the
deprecated net-tools package. But I can't find any uses of the
functions in ezbake-functions.sh.erb, so let's remove it. The
functions were used in the wrappers which were eliminated in #5.

Fixes #13.

Signed-off-by: Tim Meusel <tim.de>

(EZ-100) Use START_TIMEOUT var as default for start timeout if set

This commit uses the START_TIMEOUT environment variable as the default
for start timeout if set in the service's sysconfig/default file.

(MAINT) Add explicit nrepl references

There appears to be a bug in leiningen where it will exclude
tools.nrepl from an uberjar if it is a transitive dependency of
your project (as opposed to a first-class dependency listed in
the project.clj file that you are building the uberjar from).

See https://github.com/technomancy/leiningen/issues/1762 .

This commit adds an explicit dependency to all of

(EZ-132) Change Java runtime OOM and logfile behavior

I think this should be all that's needed. I changed

  -XX:OnOutOfMemoryError="kill -9 %p"
to
  -XX:+CrashOnOutOfMemoryError

CrashOnOutOfMemoryError has been around since Java 8, so this should work with all our products.

I also added:

    -XX:ErrorFile="${app_logdir}/${real_name}_err_pid%p.log"

(maint) Deploy snapshot & list deployed version

When staging a SNAPSHOT version of a project, EZBake will deploy
a snapshot artifact to the configured snapshots repository to ensure we
have a maven artifact for the build, and the full snapshot version of
the deployed artifacts will be listed as the version in EZBake's
manifest and project_data.yaml.

(PDB-1455) Correct termini install.sh rubylibdir fallback autodetection

The autodetection routine for AIO pathed Puppet rubylibdir wasn't working.
This showed up when we tried to point our PuppetDB source based tests at a
the ezbake upgrade branch.

This patch adds the Puppet 4/AIO path to PATH when trying to call ruby to
figure out where the terminus belongs.

Signed-off-by: Ken Barber <ken.sh>

(SERVER-2602) Do not manage egd

This setting is of little value in Java 8+ and we've seen no difference
anecdotally between explicitly configuring /dev/urandom as a source vs
using the JVMs defaults.

We will be explicitly setting this to /dev/random for FIPS enabled
builds, however we will do so via the JAVA_ARGS variable. FOSS users who
would like to manage their egd source should use JAVA_ARGS

(SERVER-3) Update EL init scripts to invoke the daemon from INSTALL_DIR

On el systems, if the service is invoked using init.d directly, while in
a root owned directory, it will fail to run several external commands
during startup. This isn't a problem for debian because we pass in a
directory to run from that will be accessible to the service user. This
commit implements the same behavior for EL

Previously, the service file referred to $project.jar, which is a
holdover from previous versions of ezbake. ezbake.rb contains
uberjar_name, which is the full filename of the installed jar, which

(PE-36861) Fix needrestart conf file

Turns out needrestart doesn't merge the values in the conf file automatically, so whichever is loaded last is what is used. This modifies it to use 'push' to enforce this merging behavior.

See https://github.com/liske/needrestart/issues/124

(maint) Cleanup foss packaging templates

This fixes some issues with the foss packaging templates, in general
merging where possible from the PE templates.

Merge pull request #415 from underscorgan/tickets/master/re-4844-merge-templates

(RE-4844) Merge FOSS/PE ezbake templates

We support/test against Java 21 and 25 in our openvoxdb/openvox-server pipelines. Our packages depend on either of those versions. Where possible, we want to use Java 25. This also adds Debian 14 / Ubuntu 26.10 to the list. They are still in development, but it's already clear that they will ship Java 25 as well. See individual commits for details.

Don't hardcode PE in the proj naming

Now that project is being automatically prefixed with PE when desired,
hardcoding it in the control and rules is no longer necessary. This
commit removes them.

OpenVox only supports platform 7 and 8, and we don't really need to worry about ancient el8 being weird. We build OpenVox with Java 11, so make this the base version, and ideally use 17 when available.

This commit will trap HUP, INT, and TERM signals sent to the start
script.  If any is trapped, the associated Java process that the start
script spawned will be terminated.  This is done so that if a 'restart'
is issued while a start is already in process, the Java process for the
first start attempt will be cleaned up before the sec

This change was tested in https://github.com/OpenVoxProject/o

Fix some version strings for compatibility

The packaging tools were making some regex-y assumptions
about how we'd format our version strings.  My previous
stuff for SNAPSHOT versions did not comply with these
assumptions; this commit should hopefully fix that.

(EZ-97) Terminate start / reload waiting loop if process dies

This commit changes the start and reload commands to exit immediately if
the service process dies while waiting for the command's action to
complete.  Previously, the commands would continue to loop unnecessarily
for up to the configured start_timeout (for start) or start_timeout / 10
(for reload) before exiting with an error.

(maint) add tzdata-java as dependency on el-7 and above platforms

With the release of openjdk-headless 11.0.20.0.8-2.el8 tzdata-java
is no longer included as a dependency of openjdk. This causes startup
failures in puppetserver when it isn't present.  This adds an explicit
dependency on the package, which is small, and is required.

Bump tk-ws-jetty9 to 0.7.2 for pe-jvm-puppet

This was using 0.5.2 which is pretty old, and also had an incompatible
dependency on schema.
